title: Minimum Path Sum
problem_statement: Find the minimum path sum from the top-left to bottom-right of a grid, moving only down or right.

examples.explanation: The path 1->3->1->1->1 has the smallest sum.

intuition: Use DP to accumulate the smallest path sum to each cell from the start.

approaches.name: 2D grid DP
approaches.description: Each cell stores the minimum sum to reach it from the top-left using only down/right moves.
approaches.why_not: Searching all paths is exponential because there are many possible routes.

interview_qa.q: What choices exist at each grid cell?
interview_qa.a: You can only come from the top or left cell.
Use a single row of DP values and update it in place.
